subject: Supreme Court Reverses Lower Court and Allows ICE Raids in California to Resume
body:
Post       : Supreme Court Reverses Lower Court and Allows ICE Raids in California to Resume
URL        : https://jonathanturley.org/2025/09/10/supreme-court-reverses-lower-court-and-allows-ice-raids-in-california-to-resume/
Posted     : September 10, 2025 at 1:07 PM
Author     : jonathanturley
Categories : Constitutional Law, Politics, Supreme Court

The Supreme Court has again rebuffed lower courts seeking to block executive actions, from immigration to the downsizing of government. In the latest victory for the Trump Administration, the Court reversed decisions of a federal district court judge and the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals to enjoin new ICE raids in California.
